name: agent-skills
description: Auto-triggering skills for Claude Code, Cowork, and OpenAI Codex — expertise that activates for the job at hand. Five tracks: Startup (idea to shipped), Review (product, UX, and eval critique), Code (discipline, stack choices, parallel agents), Calibration (tune how the agent works with you and write in your voice), and Language & Visuals (localization, in-context meaning, pixel art). Skills chain into pipelines and share a common harness — and you can author and audit your own.

interface.shortDescription: Auto-triggering skills across startup, review, code, calibration, and language work.
interface.longDescription: Agent Skills packages reusable Codex skills for product work, code review, startup planning, calibration, localization, visual generation, and agent workflow design. Install it when you want a curated collection of task-specific skills that Codex can invoke for repeatable workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Skills to help plan and sharpen my startup idea.
Review this product or code workflow with the right specialist skill.
Help me choose the best Agent Skills workflow for this task.
